name: Crown of Roses
descs:
Turn Start: inflict 4 [Burst] Potency on a random enemy(or all Abnormality parts).

When activating Gluttony Absolute Resonance, inflict 2 [Burst] Potency on all enemies at Combat Start.

Turn Start: inflict 4 [Burst] Potency on 2 random enemies(or all Abnormality parts).

When activating Gluttony Absolute Resonance, inflict 3 [Burst] Potency on all enemies at Combat Start.

Turn Start: inflict 4 [Burst] Potency on 3 random enemies(or all Abnormality parts).

When activating Gluttony Absolute Resonance, inflict 4 [Burst] Potency on all enemies at Combat Start.
